name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.integrated-demo
description: Wave 3d integration scaffold that wires the 3 UI tabs (character / stage-lighting-volume / camera-switcher) and their main-output adapters (rac / stage-lighting-volume / camera-switcher) into a single Unity scene. Provides a programmatic Bootstrap MonoBehaviour (IntegratedDemoBootstrap) that constructs the OutputSceneBootstrapper, the 3 main-output adapter Bootstrappers, the UiShellLifecycleDriver wiring, and a unified ICoreIpcBusProvider so that PlayMode UI <-> main-output IPC traffic round-trips inside the same process. Sample~/IntegratedDemo ships a step-by-step manual scene-construction README. The actual .unity scene is constructed manually by the user since Unity scene assets cannot be authored programmatically.

samples.description: Step-by-step instructions for constructing the MainDemo.unity scene that wires every tab + adapter into a single PlayMode session.
